```{r}
             aes(xintercept = w_mat_t50, colour = Legend),
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(data = w_max_t50,
             aes(xintercept = w_mat_initial, colour = Legend),
             linetype = "solid", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_x_log10(
    limits = c(1, 6000),
    breaks = c(1, 3, 10, 30, 100, 300, 500, 1000, 2000, 6000),
    labels = c(1, 3, 10, 30, 100, 300, 500, 1000, 2000, 6000)
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = species_colors) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-100, 200), xlim = c(1, 6000), clip = "off") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Change in abundance (%)", colour = "Species") +
  My_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "none")  # removed here, added via shared legend later

# ── Inset ──
spectrum1 <- p1 + inset_element(p1_inset,
                                left = 0.01, bottom = 0.6,
                                right = 0.35, top = 0.99)

# ── Heatmap data ──
death_heatmap_bream_all <- death_all_timesteps_combined %>%
  filter(
    Scenario       == target_scenario,
    !Cause         %in% c("Fishing", "External", "small_fish", "ruffe"),
    time_index     == max_t,
    baseline_value > 0.001,
    Prey           == "bream",
    w              >= 1
  )

death_heatmap_bream <- death_heatmap_bream_all %>%
  group_by(w, Cause) %>%
  summarise(normalized_change = mean(normalized_change, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

zero_band_bream <- death_heatmap_bream_all %>%
  group_by(Model, Cause) %>%
  arrange(w) %>%
  mutate(sign_change = sign(normalized_change) != sign(lag(normalized_change))) %>%
  filter(sign_change) %>%
  summarise(zero_w = first(w), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Cause) %>%
  summarise(
    zero_mean = mean(zero_w, na.rm = TRUE),
    zero_min  = min(zero_w,  na.rm = TRUE),
    zero_max  = max(zero_w,  na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

# ── p_heat1 — matching x scale to p1 ──
p_heat1 <- ggplot(death_heatmap_bream, aes(x = w, y = Cause, fill = normalized_change)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_rect(
    data = zero_band_bream,
    aes(xmin = zero_min, xmax = zero_max,
        ymin = as.numeric(factor(Cause)) - 0.5,
        ymax = as.numeric(factor(Cause)) + 0.5),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5, linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = zero_band_bream,
    aes(x = zero_mean, xend = zero_mean,
        y = as.numeric(factor(Cause)) - 0.5,
        yend = as.numeric(factor(Cause)) + 0.5),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "black", linewidth = 0.7
  ) +
  scale_x_log10(
    limits = c(1, 6000),
    breaks = c(1, 3, 10, 30, 100, 300, 500, 1000, 2000, 6000),
    labels = c(1, 3, 10, 30, 100, 300, 500, 1000, 2000, 6000)
    # no expand — matches p1 default
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2166ac", mid = "#f7f7f7", high = "#b2182b",
    midpoint = 0, limits = c(-0.3, 0.3),
    breaks = c(-0.2, -0.1, 0, 0.1, 0.2),
    labels = c("-0.2", "-0.1", "0", "0.1", "0.2"),
    na.value = "grey90", oob = scales::squish,
    name = "Predation mortality rate change (%)",
    guide = guide_colorbar(
      title.position = "top",
      barwidth       = unit(8, "lines"),
      barheight      = unit(0.6, "lines"),
      ticks          = TRUE,
      label.theme    = element_text(size = 8)
    )
  ) +
  labs(x = "Weight (g)", y = "Predator") +
  My_theme +
  theme(
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    plot.margin      = margin(0, 5, 5, 5)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1, 6000), clip = "off")  # matches p1

# ── Combine ──
final_plot1 <- spectrum1 / p_heat1 +
  plot_layout(heights = c(4, 0.5), guides = "keep")

final_plot1
```

```{r}
# ── p1 ──
p2 <- ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = nd_ratio_p2_plot %>% filter(reliable),
            aes(x = w, y = pct_change, colour = Legend,
                group = interaction(Legend, Model)),
            linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.7, linetype = "solid") +
  geom_line(data = nd_ratio_p2_plot %>% filter(!reliable),
            aes(x = w, y = pct_change, colour = Legend,
                group = interaction(Legend, Model)),
            linewidth = 1, alpha = 0.6, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "grey50") +
  geom_vline(data = w_max_t50,
             aes(xintercept = w_mat_t50, colour = Legend),
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(data = w_max_t50,
             aes(xintercept = w_mat_initial, colour = Legend),
             linetype = "solid", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_x_log10(
    limits = c(1, 6000),
    breaks = c(1, 3, 10, 30, 100, 300, 500, 1000, 2000, 6000),
    labels = c(1, 3, 10, 30, 100, 300, 500, 1000, 2000, 6000)
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = species_colors) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-100, 200), xlim = c(1, 6000), clip = "off") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Change in abundance (%)", colour = "Species") +
  My_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "none")  # removed here, added via shared legend later

# ── Inset ──
spectrum2 <- p2 + inset_element(p2_inset,
                                left = 0.01, bottom = 0.6,
                                right = 0.35, top = 0.99)

# ── Heatmap data ──
death_heatmap_bream_all <- death_all_timesteps_combined %>%
  filter(
    Scenario       == target_scenario,
    !Cause         %in% c("Fishing", "External", "small_fish", "ruffe"),
    time_index     == max_t,
    baseline_value > 0.001,
    Prey           == "bream",
    w              >= 1
  )

death_heatmap_bream <- death_heatmap_bream_all %>%
  group_by(w, Cause) %>%
  summarise(normalized_change = mean(normalized_change, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

zero_band_bream <- death_heatmap_bream_all %>%
  group_by(Model, Cause) %>%
  arrange(w) %>%
  mutate(sign_change = sign(normalized_change) != sign(lag(normalized_change))) %>%
  filter(sign_change) %>%
  summarise(zero_w = first(w), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Cause) %>%
  summarise(
    zero_mean = mean(zero_w, na.rm = TRUE),
    zero_min  = min(zero_w,  na.rm = TRUE),
    zero_max  = max(zero_w,  na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

# ── p_heat1 — matching x scale to p1 ──
p_heat2 <- ggplot(death_heatmap_bream, aes(x = w, y = Cause, fill = normalized_change)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_rect(
    data = zero_band_bream,
    aes(xmin = zero_min, xmax = zero_max,
        ymin = as.numeric(factor(Cause)) - 0.5,
        ymax = as.numeric(factor(Cause)) + 0.5),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5, linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = zero_band_bream,
    aes(x = zero_mean, xend = zero_mean,
        y = as.numeric(factor(Cause)) - 0.5,
        yend = as.numeric(factor(Cause)) + 0.5),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "black", linewidth = 0.7
  ) +
  scale_x_log10(
    limits = c(1, 6000),
    breaks = c(1, 3, 10, 30, 100, 300, 500, 1000, 2000, 6000),
    labels = c(1, 3, 10, 30, 100, 300, 500, 1000, 2000, 6000)
    # no expand — matches p1 default
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2166ac", mid = "#f7f7f7", high = "#b2182b",
    midpoint = 0, limits = c(-0.3, 0.3),
    breaks = c(-0.2, -0.1, 0, 0.1, 0.2),
    labels = c("-0.2", "-0.1", "0", "0.1", "0.2"),
    na.value = "grey90", oob = scales::squish,
    name = "Predation mortality rate change (%)",
    guide = guide_colorbar(
      title.position = "top",
      barwidth       = unit(8, "lines"),
      barheight      = unit(0.6, "lines"),
      ticks          = TRUE,
      label.theme    = element_text(size = 8)
    )
  ) +
  labs(x = "Weight (g)", y = "Predator") +
  My_theme +
  theme(
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    plot.margin      = margin(0, 5, 5, 5)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1, 6000), clip = "off")  # matches p1

# ── Combine ──
final_plot2 <- spectrum2 / p_heat2 +
  plot_layout(heights = c(4, 0.5), guides = "keep")

final_plot1 | final_plot2

library(cowplot)

legend_heatmap <- get_legend(
  p_heat1 + 
    theme(
      legend.position  = "bottom",
      legend.direction = "horizontal"
    ) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low      = "#2166ac",
      mid      = "#f7f7f7", 
      high     = "#b2182b",
      midpoint = 0,
      limits   = c(-0.4, 0.4),
      breaks   = c(-0.4, -0.2, 0, 0.2, 0.4),
      labels   = c("-0.4", "-0.2", "0", "0.2", "0.4"),
      na.value = "grey90",
      oob      = scales::squish,
      name     = "Predation mortality rate change",
      guide    = guide_colorbar(
        title.position = "top",
        barwidth       = unit(10, "lines"),
        barheight      = unit(0.8, "lines"),
        ticks          = TRUE,
        ticks.colour   = "black",
        title.theme    = element_text(size = 15, color = "black"),  # title size
        label.theme    = element_text(size = 14, color = "black")   # numbers size
      )
    )
)
```

```{r}
p1_inset <- p1_inset + theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black", linewidth = 1))
p2_inset <- p2_inset + theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black", linewidth = 1))
# ── Titles ──
p1_titled <- p1 + ggtitle("With fishing") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13))  # increase y-axis text size

p2_titled <- p2 + ggtitle("Without fishing") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13))

# ── Spectrums with insets ──
spectrum1 <- p1_titled + inset_element(p1_inset, left = 0.01, bottom = 0.6,
                                        right = 0.35, top = 0.99)
spectrum2 <- p2_titled + inset_element(p2_inset, left = 0.01, bottom = 0.6,
                                        right = 0.35, top = 0.99)

# ── Heatmap with larger predator labels ──
p_heat1 <- p_heat1 + theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13))

p_heat2_clean <- p_heat2 +
  theme(axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank())

# ── Final plots ──
final_plot1_clean <- (spectrum1 / p_heat1) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(4, 0.5)) &
  theme(legend.position = "none")

final_plot2_clean <- (spectrum2 / p_heat2_clean) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(4, 0.5)) &
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.title.y    = element_blank())

library(cowplot)

# ── Legends ──
legend_species <- get_legend(
  p1 + theme(legend.position  = "bottom",
             legend.direction = "horizontal",
             legend.text      = element_text(size = 17),
             legend.title     = element_text(size = 16)) +
    guides(colour = guide_legend(nrow = 1,
                                 override.aes = list(linewidth = 2)))
)

legend_species <- get_legend(
  p1 + theme(legend.position  = "bottom",
             legend.direction = "horizontal",
             legend.text      = element_text(size = 17),
             legend.title     = element_text(size = 16)) +
    guides(colour = guide_legend(nrow = 1))
)

legend_heatmap <- get_legend(
  p_heat1 + theme(legend.position  = "bottom",
                  legend.direction = "horizontal"),
  title.theme    = element_text(size = 16, color = "black"),  # title size
        label.theme    = element_text(size = 15, color = "black")   # numbers size
)

# ── Combine ──
final_with_legend <- plot_grid(
  patchworkGrob(final_plot1_clean | final_plot2_clean),
  legend_heatmap,
  legend_species,
  ncol        = 1,
  rel_heights = c(1, 0.08, 0.10)
)

final_with_legend
# ggsave("final_with_legend0.tiff", final_with_legend, width = 14, height = 9, dpi = 600, bg = "white")

```

# biomass change in different stages of size spectrum

new w_max, w_mat.. size bins

```{r}
species  <- c("small_fish", "ruffe", "bream", "white_bream", "roach", "perch", "pikeperch")

# w mat25 new
targets <- c(0.7, 2, 203.887, 12.70513, 29.6453, 53.84554, 229.9023)
# w mat 50 new
targets <- c(1, 3, 303.108, 19.9652, 43.56044, 99.826, 376.3138)
# w mat75 new
targets <- c(1.7, 5, 506.9951, 32.67033, 73.20573, 153.6715, 606.2161)
# w max new
targets <- c(28, 144, 2783.0279, 474.9298, 719.9572, 1107.1611, 3630.0364)

data.frame(
  species = species,
  target  = targets,
  bin_index = sapply(targets, function(x) which.min(abs(w_bins - x))),
  bin_value = sapply(targets, function(x) w_bins[which.min(abs(w_bins - x))])
)

```

old w max bin

```{r}
# Get w_max for each species
w_max_species <- species_params(cur_model)$w_max
names(w_max_species) <- species_params(cur_model)$species

# Find bin index for each species w_max
data.frame(
  species   = species_params(cur_model)$species,
  w_max     = w_max_species,
  bin_index = sapply(w_max_species, function(x) which.min(abs(w_bins - x))),
  bin_value = sapply(w_max_species, function(x) w_bins[which.min(abs(w_bins - x))])
)
```

zero crossing bin

```{r}
zero_crossing <- nd_ratio %>%
  filter(!Legend %in% c("small_fish", "ruffe")) %>%
  group_by(Legend, Model) %>%
  arrange(w) %>%
  mutate(sign = sign(pct_change),
         sign_change = sign != lag(sign) & lag(sign) == 1 & sign == -1) %>%
  filter(sign_change) %>%
  slice(n()) %>%  # take LAST crossing
  summarise(
    w_zero_crossing = w,
    bin_index = which.min(abs(w_bins - w)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(zero_crossing)
```

new w mat size bin

```{r}
data.frame(
  species   = species_params(cur_model)$species,
  w_mat_new = w_max_t50$w_mat_t50,
  bin_index = sapply(w_max_t50$w_mat_t50, function(x) which.min(abs(w_bins - x))),
  bin_value = sapply(w_max_t50$w_mat_t50, function(x) w_bins[which.min(abs(w_bins - x))])
)
```

new w mat25 size bin

```{r}
data.frame(
  species   = species_params(cur_model)$species,
  w_mat_new = w_max_t50$w_mat_t25,
  bin_index = sapply(w_max_t50$w_mat_t25, function(x) which.min(abs(w_bins - x))),
  bin_value = sapply(w_max_t50$w_mat_t25, function(x) w_bins[which.min(abs(w_bins - x))])
)
```

what percentage of the total initial biomass was lost/gained specifically in the size classes?

Absolute biomass change in each size class as a proportion of total initial biomass. This naturally weights changes by the initial biomass concentration --- a 87% loss in a size class holding only 1% of total biomass is ecologically less significant than a 12% loss in a size class holding 60% of total biomass. Size classes that were both biomass-rich and strongly affected contribute most to the total change, making this a more informative measure than within-class percentage change alone.

```{r}
n_firstM <- all_model_results$M7_kappa9_lambda2.05extMort01_0.333.rds$species_3_4_5_6_7
n <- N(n_firstM)
w <- w(n_firstM@params)

# Total initial biomass for bream
bins_all <- 1:200
B_total1.3 <- sum(n[1, 3, bins_all] * w_bins[bins_all] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_all])

# Each class contribution relative to TOTAL initial biomass
bins_big  <- 191:200
bins_mid  <- 188:190
bins_mat  <- 162:187
bins_small <- 1:161

pct_big   <- 100 * (sum(n[1,3,bins_big]   * w_bins[bins_big]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_big])   - 
                    sum(n[51,3,bins_big]   * w_bins[bins_big]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_big]))   / B_total1.3

pct_mid   <- 100 * (sum(n[1,3,bins_mid]   * w_bins[bins_mid]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mid])   - 
                    sum(n[51,3,bins_mid]   * w_bins[bins_mid]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mid]))   / B_total1.3

pct_mat   <- 100 * (sum(n[1,3,bins_mat]   * w_bins[bins_mat]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mat])   - 
                    sum(n[51,3,bins_mat]   * w_bins[bins_mat]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mat]))   / B_total1.3

pct_small <- 100 * (sum(n[1,3,bins_small] * w_bins[bins_small] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_small]) - 
                    sum(n[51,3,bins_small] * w_bins[bins_small] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_small])) / B_total1.3

# These will now sum to the total % change
cat("big:  ", pct_big, "\n")
cat("mid:  ", pct_mid, "\n")
cat("mat:  ", pct_mat, "\n")
cat("small:", pct_small, "\n")
cat("total:", pct_big + pct_mid + pct_mat + pct_small, "\n")

# Verify against direct total
B_total51.3 <- sum(n[51, 3, bins_all] * w_bins[bins_all] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_all])
cat("direct total % change:", 100 * (B_total1.3 - B_total51.3) / B_total1.3, "\n")
```

white bream

```{r}
# Total initial biomass for white bream
bins_all <- 1:200
B_total1.4 <- sum(n[1, 4, bins_all] * w_bins[bins_all] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_all])

# Each class contribution relative to TOTAL initial biomass
bins_big  <- 169:200
bins_mat  <- 127:168
bins_small <- 1:126

pct_big   <- 100 * (sum(n[1,4,bins_big]   * w_bins[bins_big]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_big])   - 
                    sum(n[51,4,bins_big]   * w_bins[bins_big]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_big]))   / B_total1.4

pct_mat   <- 100 * (sum(n[1,4,bins_mat]   * w_bins[bins_mat]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mat])   - 
                    sum(n[51,4,bins_mat]   * w_bins[bins_mat]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mat]))   / B_total1.4

pct_small <- 100 * (sum(n[1,4,bins_small] * w_bins[bins_small] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_small]) - 
                    sum(n[51,4,bins_small] * w_bins[bins_small] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_small])) / B_total1.4

# These will now sum to the total % change
cat("big:  ", pct_big, "\n")
cat("mat:  ", pct_mat, "\n")
cat("small:", pct_small, "\n")
cat("total:", pct_big + pct_mat + pct_small, "\n")

# Verify against direct total
B_total51.4 <- sum(n[51, 4, bins_all] * w_bins[bins_all] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_all])
cat("direct total % change:", 100 * (B_total1.4 - B_total51.4) / B_total1.4, "\n")
```

```{r}
# Total initial biomass for roach
bins_all <- 1:200
B_total1.5 <- sum(n[1, 5, bins_all] * w_bins[bins_all] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_all])

# Each class contribution relative to TOTAL initial biomass
bins_big  <- 174:200
bins_mid  <- 157:173
bins_mat  <- 137:156
bins_small <- 1:136

pct_big   <- 100 * (sum(n[1,5,bins_big]   * w_bins[bins_big]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_big])   - 
                    sum(n[51,5,bins_big]   * w_bins[bins_big]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_big]))   / B_total1.5

pct_mid   <- 100 * (sum(n[1,5,bins_mid]   * w_bins[bins_mid]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mid])   - 
                    sum(n[51,5,bins_mid]   * w_bins[bins_mid]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mid]))   / B_total1.5

pct_mat   <- 100 * (sum(n[1,5,bins_mat]   * w_bins[bins_mat]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mat])   - 
                    sum(n[51,5,bins_mat]   * w_bins[bins_mat]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mat]))   / B_total1.5

pct_small <- 100 * (sum(n[1,5,bins_small] * w_bins[bins_small] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_small]) - 
                    sum(n[51,5,bins_small] * w_bins[bins_small] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_small])) / B_total1.5

# These will now sum to the total % change
cat("big:  ", pct_big, "\n")
cat("mid:  ", pct_mid, "\n")
cat("mat:  ", pct_mat, "\n")
cat("small:", pct_small, "\n")
cat("total:", pct_big + pct_mid + pct_mat + pct_small, "\n")

# Verify against direct total
B_total51.5 <- sum(n[51, 5, bins_all] * w_bins[bins_all] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_all])
cat("direct total % change:", 100 * (B_total1.5 - B_total51.5) / B_total1.5, "\n")
```

```{r}
# Total initial biomass for perch
bins_all <- 1:200
B_total1.6 <- sum(n[1, 6, bins_all] * w_bins[bins_all] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_all])

# Each class contribution relative to TOTAL initial biomass
bins_big  <- 179:200
bins_mid  <- 172:178
bins_mat  <- 148:171
bins_small <- 1:147

pct_big   <- 100 * (sum(n[1,6,bins_big]   * w_bins[bins_big]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_big])   - 
                    sum(n[51,6,bins_big]   * w_bins[bins_big]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_big]))   / B_total1.6

pct_mid   <- 100 * (sum(n[1,6,bins_mid]   * w_bins[bins_mid]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mid])   - 
                    sum(n[51,6,bins_mid]   * w_bins[bins_mid]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mid]))   / B_total1.6

pct_mat   <- 100 * (sum(n[1,6,bins_mat]   * w_bins[bins_mat]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mat])   - 
                    sum(n[51,6,bins_mat]   * w_bins[bins_mat]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mat]))   / B_total1.6

pct_small <- 100 * (sum(n[1,6,bins_small] * w_bins[bins_small] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_small]) - 
                    sum(n[51,6,bins_small] * w_bins[bins_small] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_small])) / B_total1.6

# These will now sum to the total % change
cat("big:  ", pct_big, "\n")
cat("mid:  ", pct_mid, "\n")
cat("mat:  ", pct_mat, "\n")
cat("small:", pct_small, "\n")
cat("total:", pct_big + pct_mid + pct_mat + pct_small, "\n")

# Verify against direct total
B_total51.6 <- sum(n[51, 6, bins_all] * w_bins[bins_all] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_all])
cat("direct total % change:", 100 * (B_total1.6 - B_total51.6) / B_total1.6, "\n")

```

```{r}
# Total initial biomass for pikeperch
bins_all <- 1:200
B_total1.7 <- sum(n[1, 7, bins_all] * w_bins[bins_all] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_all])

# Each class contribution relative to TOTAL initial biomass
bins_big  <- 195:200
bins_mid  <- 193:194
bins_mat  <- 165:192
bins_small <- 1:164

pct_big   <- 100 * (sum(n[1,7,bins_big]   * w_bins[bins_big]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_big])   - 
                    sum(n[51,7,bins_big]   * w_bins[bins_big]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_big]))   / B_total1.7

pct_mid   <- 100 * (sum(n[1,7,bins_mid]   * w_bins[bins_mid]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mid])   - 
                    sum(n[51,7,bins_mid]   * w_bins[bins_mid]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mid]))   / B_total1.7

pct_mat   <- 100 * (sum(n[1,7,bins_mat]   * w_bins[bins_mat]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mat])   - 
                    sum(n[51,7,bins_mat]   * w_bins[bins_mat]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mat]))   / B_total1.7

pct_small <- 100 * (sum(n[1,7,bins_small] * w_bins[bins_small] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_small]) - 
                    sum(n[51,7,bins_small] * w_bins[bins_small] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_small])) / B_total1.7

# These will now sum to the total % change
cat("big:  ", pct_big, "\n")
cat("mid:  ", pct_mid, "\n")
cat("mat:  ", pct_mat, "\n")
cat("small:", pct_small, "\n")
cat("total:", pct_big + pct_mid + pct_mat + pct_small, "\n")

# Verify against direct total
B_total51.7 <- sum(n[51, 7, bins_all] * w_bins[bins_all] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_all])
cat("direct total % change:", 100 * (B_total1.7 - B_total51.7) / B_total1.7, "\n")
```

```{r}
# Total initial biomass for ruffe
bins_all <- 1:200
B_total1.2 <- sum(n[1, 2, bins_all] * w_bins[bins_all] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_all])

# Each class contribution relative to TOTAL initial biomass
bins_mat  <- 103:200
bins_small <- 1:102

pct_mat   <- 100 * (sum(n[1,2,bins_mat]   * w_bins[bins_mat]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mat])   - 
                    sum(n[51,2,bins_mat]   * w_bins[bins_mat]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mat]))   / B_total1.2

pct_small <- 100 * (sum(n[1,2,bins_small] * w_bins[bins_small] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_small]) - 
                    sum(n[51,2,bins_small] * w_bins[bins_small] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_small])) / B_total1.2

# These will now sum to the total % change
cat("mat:  ", pct_mat, "\n")
cat("small:", pct_small, "\n")
cat("total:", pct_mat + pct_small, "\n")

# Verify against direct total
B_total51.2 <- sum(n[51, 2, bins_all] * w_bins[bins_all] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_all])
cat("direct total % change:", 100 * (B_total1.2 - B_total51.2) / B_total1.2, "\n")
```

```{r}
# Total initial biomass for small fish
bins_all <- 1:200
B_total1.1 <- sum(n[1, 1, bins_all] * w_bins[bins_all] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_all])

# Each class contribution relative to TOTAL initial biomass

bins_mat  <- 89:200
bins_small <- 1:88

pct_mat   <- 100 * (sum(n[1,1,bins_mat]   * w_bins[bins_mat]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mat])   - 
                    sum(n[51,1,bins_mat]   * w_bins[bins_mat]   * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_mat]))   / B_total1.1

pct_small <- 100 * (sum(n[1,1,bins_small] * w_bins[bins_small] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_small]) - 
                    sum(n[51,1,bins_small] * w_bins[bins_small] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_small])) / B_total1.1

# These will now sum to the total % change
cat("mat:  ", pct_mat, "\n")
cat("small:", pct_small, "\n")
cat("total:", pct_mat + pct_small, "\n")

# Verify against direct total
B_total51.1 <- sum(n[51, 1, bins_all] * w_bins[bins_all] * dw(n_firstM@params)[bins_all])
cat("direct total % change:", 100 * (B_total1.1 - B_total51.1) / B_total1.1, "\n")
```

size change table test needed for below code

```{r}
n_firstM <- all_model_results$M5_kappa7_lambda2.05extMort01_0.333.rds$species_3_4_5_6_7
n <- N(n_firstM)
w <- w(n_firstM@params)

#install.packages("gt")
library(gt)

# ── helper ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
compute_biomass_pct <- function(sp_idx, size_classes) {
  # size_classes: named list of bin ranges, e.g. list(small=1:88, mat=89:200)
  bins_all <- 1:200
  dw_vec   <- dw(n_firstM@params)
  w        <- w_bins

  B0 <- sum(n[1,  sp_idx, bins_all] * w[bins_all] * dw_vec[bins_all])
  B1 <- sum(n[51, sp_idx, bins_all] * w[bins_all] * dw_vec[bins_all])

 # In compute_biomass_pct, change the sign:
pcts <- sapply(size_classes, function(bins) {
  100 * (
    sum(n[51, sp_idx, bins] * w[bins] * dw_vec[bins]) -   # B1 first
    sum(n[1,  sp_idx, bins] * w[bins] * dw_vec[bins])
  ) / B0
})

c(pcts, total = sum(pcts), direct = 100 * (B1 - B0) / B0)
}

# ── species definitions ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
species_list <- list(
  list(name = "Small fish",   idx = 1, classes = list(small = 1:85,   mat = 86:96, mid = 97:132, big = 133:200)),
  list(name = "Ruffe",        idx = 2, classes = list(small = 1:98,  mat = 99:110, mid = 111:152, big = 153:200)),
  list(name = "Bream",        idx = 3, classes = list(small = 1:157,  mat = 158:168, mid = 169:190, big = 191:200)),
  list(name = "White bream",  idx = 4, classes = list(small = 1:121,  mat = 122:134, mid = 135:168, big = 169:200)),
  list(name = "Roach",        idx = 5, classes = list(small = 1:132,  mat = 133:144, mid = 145:173, big = 174:200)),
  list(name = "Perch",        idx = 6, classes = list(small = 1:140,  mat = 141:153, mid = 154:178, big = 179:200)),
  list(name = "Pikeperch",    idx = 7, classes = list(small = 1:158,  mat = 159:171, mid = 172:194, big = 195:200))
)

```

```{r}
# ── compute for all models ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
all_classes <- c("small", "mat", "mid", "big")

compute_biomass_pct_model <- function(model_results, species_list) {
  n_sim  <- model_results$species_3_4_5_6_7
  n      <- N(n_sim)
  dw_vec <- dw(n_sim@params)
  w_bins <- w(n_sim@params)

  lapply(species_list, function(sp) {
    bins_all <- 1:200
    B0 <- sum(n[1,  sp$idx, bins_all] * w_bins[bins_all] * dw_vec[bins_all])
    B1 <- sum(n[51, sp$idx, bins_all] * w_bins[bins_all] * dw_vec[bins_all])

    pcts <- sapply(sp$classes, function(bins) {
      100 * (
        sum(n[51, sp$idx, bins] * w_bins[bins] * dw_vec[bins]) -
        sum(n[1,  sp$idx, bins] * w_bins[bins] * dw_vec[bins])
      ) / B0
    })

    row        <- as.list(pcts[all_classes])
    row$total  <- 100 * (B1 - B0) / B0
    row$species <- sp$name
    as.data.frame(row, check.names = FALSE)
  }) |> bind_rows()
}

# Run across all 5 models
all_results <- lapply(names(all_model_results), function(m) {
  compute_biomass_pct_model(all_model_results[[m]], species_list) |>
    mutate(model = m)
}) |> bind_rows()

# ── summarise: min–max range per species × size class ────────────────────────
range_df <- all_results |>
  group_by(species) |>
  summarise(across(c(small, mat, mid, big, total),
                   list(min = ~min(., na.rm = TRUE),
                        max = ~max(., na.rm = TRUE))),
            .groups = "drop")

# ── format as "min – max" labels ─────────────────────────────────────────────
format_range <- function(min_val, max_val) {
  min_r <- round(min_val, 0)
  max_r <- round(max_val, 0)
  ifelse(
    is.na(min_val), NA_character_,
    ifelse(
      min_r == max_r,
      as.character(min_r),
      paste0(min_r, " – ", max_r)
    )
  )
}

results_displayF <- range_df |>
  mutate(
    small = format_range(small_min, small_max),
    mat   = format_range(mat_min,   mat_max),
    mid   = format_range(mid_min,   mid_max),
    big   = format_range(big_min,   big_max),
    total = format_range(total_min, total_max)
  ) |>
  select(species, small, mat, mid, big, total)

# ── total row: sum across species per model first, then range ─────────────────
totals_row <- all_results |>
  group_by(model) |>
  summarise(across(c(small, mat, mid, big, total),
                   ~sum(., na.rm = TRUE)),
            .groups = "drop") |>
  summarise(across(c(small, mat, mid, big, total),
                   list(min = ~min(., na.rm = TRUE),
                        max = ~max(., na.rm = TRUE)))) |>
  mutate(
    small   = format_range(small_min, small_max),
    mat     = format_range(mat_min,   mat_max),
    mid     = format_range(mid_min,   mid_max),
    big     = format_range(big_min,   big_max),
    total   = format_range(total_min, total_max),
    species = "Total"
  ) |>
  select(species, small, mat, mid, big, total)

results_displayF <- bind_rows(results_displayF, totals_row)

# ── gt table ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
results_displayF |>
  gt(rowname_col = "species") |>
  tab_header(
    title    = "Biomass change by size class",
    subtitle = "Range (min – max) across 5 models, % relative to initial total biomass at year 50"
  ) |>
  cols_label(
    small = "Small",
    mat   = "Mature",
    mid   = "Mid",
    big   = "Large",
    total = "Total"
  ) |>
  sub_missing(missing_text = "—") |>
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels()
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#f0f0f0"),
    locations = cells_body(columns = total)
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_body(columns = total)
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(weight = "bold", style = "italic"),
    locations = cells_stub(rows = "Total")
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#e8e8e8"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = species == "Total")
  ) |>
  tab_spanner(
    label   = "Size class contribution (% of B₀)",
    columns = c(small, mat, mid, big)
  ) |>
  opt_stylize(style = 6, color = "blue")

```

```{r}
# Sum of size class totals row (small + mat + mid + big summed across species)
all_results |>
  group_by(model) |>
  summarise(size_sum = sum(small, na.rm = TRUE) + 
                       sum(mat,   na.rm = TRUE) + 
                       sum(mid,   na.rm = TRUE) + 
                       sum(big,   na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  summarise(
    min_size = min(size_sum),
    max_size = max(size_sum)
  )

# Sum of total column (direct B1-B0 calculation summed across species)
all_results |>
  group_by(model) |>
  summarise(total_sum = sum(total, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  summarise(
    min_total = min(total_sum),
    max_total = max(total_sum)
  )
```

# no fishing number change

```{r}
n_firstM <- all_model_results$M5_kappa7_lambda2.05extMort01_0.333.rds$species_3_4_5_6_7
n <- N(n_firstM)
w <- w(n_firstM@params)

#install.packages("gt")
library(gt)

# ── helper ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
compute_biomass_pct <- function(sp_idx, size_classes) {
  # size_classes: named list of bin ranges, e.g. list(small=1:88, mat=89:200)
  bins_all <- 1:200
  dw_vec   <- dw(n_firstM@params)
  w        <- w_bins

  B0 <- sum(n[1,  sp_idx, bins_all] * w[bins_all] * dw_vec[bins_all])
  B1 <- sum(n[51, sp_idx, bins_all] * w[bins_all] * dw_vec[bins_all])

 # In compute_biomass_pct, change the sign:
pcts <- sapply(size_classes, function(bins) {
  100 * (
    sum(n[51, sp_idx, bins] * w[bins] * dw_vec[bins]) -   # B1 first
    sum(n[1,  sp_idx, bins] * w[bins] * dw_vec[bins])
  ) / B0
})

c(pcts, total = sum(pcts), direct = 100 * (B1 - B0) / B0)
}

# ── species definitions ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
species_list <- list(
  list(name = "Small fish",   idx = 1, classes = list(small = 1:88,   mat = 89:200)),
  list(name = "Ruffe",        idx = 2, classes = list(small = 1:102,  mat = 103:200)),
  list(name = "Bream",        idx = 3, classes = list(small = 1:161,  mat = 162:190, big = 191:200)),
  list(name = "White bream",  idx = 4, classes = list(small = 1:126,  mat = 127:168, big = 169:200)),
  list(name = "Roach",        idx = 5, classes = list(small = 1:136,  mat = 137:173, big = 174:200)),
  list(name = "Perch",        idx = 6, classes = list(small = 1:147,  mat = 148:178, big = 179:200)),
  list(name = "Pikeperch",    idx = 7, classes = list(small = 1:164,  mat = 165:194, big = 195:200))
)

```

```{r}
# ── compute for all models ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
all_classes <- c("small", "mat", "big")

compute_biomass_pct_model <- function(model_results, species_list) {
  n_sim  <- model_results$species_3_4_5_6_7
  n      <- N(n_sim)
  dw_vec <- dw(n_sim@params)
  w_bins <- w(n_sim@params)

  lapply(species_list, function(sp) {
    bins_all <- 1:200
    B0 <- sum(n[1,  sp$idx, bins_all] * w_bins[bins_all] * dw_vec[bins_all])
    B1 <- sum(n[51, sp$idx, bins_all] * w_bins[bins_all] * dw_vec[bins_all])

    pcts <- sapply(sp$classes, function(bins) {
      100 * (
        sum(n[51, sp$idx, bins] * w_bins[bins] * dw_vec[bins]) -
        sum(n[1,  sp$idx, bins] * w_bins[bins] * dw_vec[bins])
      ) / B0
    })

    row        <- as.list(pcts[all_classes])
    row$total  <- 100 * (B1 - B0) / B0
    row$species <- sp$name
    as.data.frame(row, check.names = FALSE)
  }) |> bind_rows()
}

# Run across all 5 models
all_results <- lapply(names(all_model_results), function(m) {
  compute_biomass_pct_model(all_model_results[[m]], species_list) |>
    mutate(model = m)
}) |> bind_rows()

# ── summarise: min–max range per species × size class ────────────────────────
range_df <- all_results |>
  group_by(species) |>
  summarise(across(c(small, mat, big, total),
                   list(min = ~min(., na.rm = TRUE),
                        max = ~max(., na.rm = TRUE))),
            .groups = "drop")

# ── format as "min – max" labels ─────────────────────────────────────────────
format_range <- function(min_val, max_val) {
  min_r <- round(min_val, 0)
  max_r <- round(max_val, 0)
  ifelse(
    is.na(min_val), NA_character_,
    ifelse(
      min_r == max_r,
      as.character(min_r),
      paste0(min_r, " – ", max_r)
    )
  )
}

results_display <- range_df |>
  mutate(
    small = format_range(small_min, small_max),
    mat   = format_range(mat_min,   mat_max),
    big   = format_range(big_min,   big_max),
    total = format_range(total_min, total_max)
  ) |>
  select(species, small, mat, big, total)

# ── total row: sum across species per model first, then range ─────────────────
totals_row <- all_results |>
  group_by(model) |>
  summarise(across(c(small, mat, big, total),
                   ~sum(., na.rm = TRUE)),
            .groups = "drop") |>
  summarise(across(c(small, mat, big, total),
                   list(min = ~min(., na.rm = TRUE),
                        max = ~max(., na.rm = TRUE)))) |>
  mutate(
    small   = format_range(small_min, small_max),
    mat     = format_range(mat_min,   mat_max),
    big     = format_range(big_min,   big_max),
    total   = format_range(total_min, total_max),
    species = "Total"
  ) |>
  select(species, small, mat, big, total)

results_display <- bind_rows(results_display, totals_row)

# ── gt table ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
results_display |>
  gt(rowname_col = "species") |>
  tab_header(
    title    = "Biomass change by size class",
    subtitle = "Range (min – max) across 5 models, % relative to initial total biomass at year 50"
  ) |>
  cols_label(
    small = "Small",
    mat   = "Mature",
    big   = "Large",
    total = "Total"
  ) |>
  sub_missing(missing_text = "—") |>
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels()
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#f0f0f0"),
    locations = cells_body(columns = total)
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_body(columns = total)
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(weight = "bold", style = "italic"),
    locations = cells_stub(rows = "Total")
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#e8e8e8"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = species == "Total")
  ) |>
  tab_spanner(
    label   = "Size class contribution (% of B₀)",
    columns = c(small, mat, big)
  ) |>
  opt_stylize(style = 6, color = "blue")

```

```{r}
# Sum of size class totals row (small + mat + mid + big summed across species)
all_results |>
  group_by(model) |>
  summarise(size_sum = sum(small, na.rm = TRUE) + 
                       sum(mat,   na.rm = TRUE) + 
                       sum(big,   na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  summarise(
    min_size = min(size_sum),
    max_size = max(size_sum)
  )

# Sum of total column (direct B1-B0 calculation summed across species)
all_results |>
  group_by(model) |>
  summarise(total_sum = sum(total, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  summarise(
    min_total = min(total_sum),
    max_total = max(total_sum)
  )
```

# Pred kernel

```{r}
cur_model <- read_rds("M5_kappa7_lambda2.05extMort01_0.333.rds")
pk     <- getPredKernel(cur_model)
w_prey <- cur_model@w_full
w_grid <- cur_model@w

predators <- list(
  list(species = "pikeperch", weight = 3000),
  list(species = "perch",     weight = 800)
)

pk_df <- purrr::map_dfr(predators, function(pred) {
  sp_idx   <- which(dimnames(pk)[[1]] == pred$species)
  w_idx    <- which.min(abs(w_grid - pred$weight))
  actual_w <- w_grid[w_idx]
  phi      <- pk[sp_idx, w_idx, ]
  
  data.frame(
    prey_w   = w_prey,
    phi      = phi,
    species  = pred$species,
    actual_w = actual_w,
    peak_w   = w_prey[which.max(phi)],  # prey weight at peak kernel
    label    = paste0(pred$species, " (", pred$weight, " g)")
  )
})

ggplot(pk_df, aes(x = prey_w, y = phi)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1, color = "grey20") +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = actual_w), linetype = "dashed",
             color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = peak_w), linetype = "dashed",
             color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(x = peak_w, y = max(phi) * 0.6,
                label = paste0("Peak: ", round(peak_w, 1), " g")),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 6, color = "grey40",
            data = pk_df %>% distinct(label, peak_w, .keep_all = TRUE)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 500)) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  facet_wrap2(~ label, axes = "all") +   # forces axes on all facets
  labs(
    x = "Prey weight (g)",
    y = "Predation kernel φ"
  ) +
  My_theme +
  theme(
    axis.line.x.bottom = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
    axis.line.y.left   = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)
  )
```

Predation change

predation rate = integral over all predator sizes of (predation kernel × predator abundance)
```{r}
sim    <- all_model_results[["M5_kappa7_lambda2.05extMort01_0.333.rds"]][["species_3_4_5_6_7"]]
params <- sim@params

t_first <- 1
t_last  <- dim(sim@n)[1]

n_first    <- sim@n[t_first, , ]
n_last     <- sim@n[t_last, , ]
n_pp_first <- sim@n_pp[t_first, ]
n_pp_last  <- sim@n_pp[t_last, ]

# Predation rate over prey size grid (w_full)
pr_first <- getPredRate(params, n = n_first, n_pp = n_pp_first)
pr_last  <- getPredRate(params, n = n_last,  n_pp = n_pp_last)

sp_idx   <- which(dimnames(pr_first)[[1]] == "pikeperch")
w_prey   <- params@w_full

pr_df <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(prey_w = w_prey, pred_rate = pr_first[sp_idx, ], version = "First time step (t=0)"),
  data.frame(prey_w = w_prey, pred_rate = pr_last[sp_idx, ],  version = "Last time step (t=50)")
)

ggplot(pr_df, aes(x = prey_w, y = pred_rate, color = version)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("First time step (t=0)" = "#93AA00",
                                "Last time step (t=50)" = "#2166ac")) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 500)) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(
    title    = "Predation rate — pikeperch",
    subtitle = "Scenario: w_mat decline in species 3–7",
    x        = "Prey weight (g)",
    y        = "Predation rate",
    color    = NULL,
    caption  = "Model: M5_kappa7_lambda2.05extMort01_0.333"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    axis.line          = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
    axis.text          = element_text(size = 9, color = "black"),
    axis.title         = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    axis.ticks         = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
    plot.title         = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 10, color = "gray40"),
    plot.background    = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.margin        = margin(10, 15, 10, 10),
    legend.position    = "top"
  )

```


# Yields with true effort

```{r}
psi_at_t <- function(params, t) {
  op  <- params@other_params$psi
  idx <- floor(t) + 1
  idx <- max(1, min(idx, dim(op)[1]))   # clamp to valid range
  list(psi = op[idx, , ])
}

# === REALISTIC YEAR-BY-YEAR EFFORT: baseline vs decline ===

# --- 0. Effort matrix + spin-up state (unchanged) ---
build_realistic_effort <- function(params) {
  current_gear        <- gear_params(params)
  current_gear$gear   <- current_gear$species
  gear_params(params) <- current_gear
  params <- setParams(params)

  f_main_complete <- cbind(small_fish = rep(0, nrow(f_main)),
                           ruffe      = rep(0, nrow(f_main)),
                           f_main)
  rownames(f_main_complete) <- as.character(years_data)

  sim2 <- project(params, effort = initial_effort, t_max = 300, dt = 0.1)

  species_order   <- species_params(sim2@params)$species
  f_main_ordered  <- f_main_complete[, species_order]
  relative_effort <- sweep(f_main_ordered, 2,
                           gear_params(sim2@params)$catchability, "/")
  relative_effort[is.nan(relative_effort)] <- 0

  list(
    effort_full = add_ramp_up(relative_effort),   # rows named 1893:2023
    n_init      = sim2@n[300, , ],
    npp_init    = sim2@n_pp[300, ]
  )
}

# --- 1. psi-array builder (unchanged; 31 rows for times 0:30) ---
make_psi_array <- function(params, decrease_rate, n_years = 30) {
  times   <- 0:n_years
  species <- species_params(params)$species
  n_sp    <- length(species)
  w       <- params@w

  psi_array <- array(NA, dim = c(length(times), n_sp, length(w)),
                     dimnames = list(time = times, sp = species, w = w))

  w_mat_array   <- matrix(NA, length(times), n_sp)
  w_mat25_array <- w_mat_array
  w_max_array   <- w_mat_array

  w_mat_cur   <- params@species_params$w_mat
  w_mat25_cur <- params@species_params$w_mat25
  w_max_cur   <- params@species_params$w_max

  for (i in seq_along(times)) {
    w_mat_array[i, ]   <- w_mat_cur
    w_mat25_array[i, ] <- w_mat25_cur
    w_max_array[i, ]   <- w_max_cur
    w_mat_cur   <- w_mat_cur   * (1 - decrease_rate)
    w_mat25_cur <- w_mat25_cur * (1 - decrease_rate)
    w_max_cur   <- w_max_cur   * (1 - decrease_rate)
  }

  m <- params@species_params$m
  n <- params@species_params$n

  for (t in seq_along(times)) {
    for (sp in seq_len(n_sp)) {
      w_mat_t   <- w_mat_array[t, sp]
      w_mat25_t <- w_mat25_array[t, sp]
      w_rmax    <- w_max_array[t, sp]
      if (!is.na(w_mat_t) && !is.na(w_mat25_t) && w_mat_t > w_mat25_t) {
        U        <- log(3) / log(w_mat_t / w_mat25_t)
        maturity <- (1 + (w / w_mat_t)^(-U))^(-1)
        maturity[maturity < 1e-08] <- 0
        repro_prop <- (w / w_rmax)^(m[sp] - n[sp])
        repro_prop[repro_prop > 1] <- 1
        psi <- maturity * repro_prop
        psi[psi > 1] <- 1
        psi[w > w_rmax] <- 1
        psi_array[t, sp, ] <- psi
      } else {
        psi_array[t, sp, ] <- 0
      }
    }
  }
  psi_array
}

# --- 2. Run one model: spin up to 1992, then project 1993-2022 ---
#     under YEAR-BY-YEAR historical effort + time-varying psi.
decline_start <- 1993
decline_end   <- 2022                          # 30 steps -> times 0:30
n_years       <- decline_end - decline_start + 1   # = 30

run_realistic_decline <- function(params, decrease_rate) {
  re   <- build_realistic_effort(params)
  eff  <- re$effort_full
  yrs  <- as.numeric(rownames(eff))

  # State at end of 1992 (start of decline window)
  hist_rows <- yrs <= (decline_start - 1)       # 1893..1992
  sim_hist  <- project(params, effort = eff[hist_rows, , drop = FALSE],
                        dt = 0.1, t_save = 1,
                        initial_n   = re$n_init,
                        initial_n_pp = re$npp_init)
  last <- dim(sim_hist@n)[1]
  n0   <- sim_hist@n[last, , ]
  npp0 <- sim_hist@n_pp[last, ]

  # Projection-window effort: 1993..2022 (year-by-year, real variation)
  proj_rows   <- yrs >= decline_start & yrs <= decline_end
  effort_proj <- eff[proj_rows, , drop = FALSE]   # 30 rows

  p2 <- params
  p2@other_params$psi <- make_psi_array(p2, decrease_rate, n_years)
  p2 <- setRateFunction(p2, "ERepro", "timeVaryingERepro")

  project(p2, dt = 0.1, t_save = 1,
          effort      = effort_proj,
          initial_n   = n0,
          initial_n_pp = npp0)
}

# --- 3. Loop models x {baseline, decline} ---
decline_rate  <- c(0, 0, 0.01, 0.01, 0.01, 0.01, 0.01)
baseline_rate <- rep(0, 7)

realistic_results <- list()
for (mn in names(models)) {
  cat("Model:", mn, "\n")
  realistic_results[[mn]] <- list(
    Baseline                = run_realistic_decline(models[[mn]], baseline_rate),
    `With maturity decline` = run_realistic_decline(models[[mn]], decline_rate)
  )
}

# --- 4. Tidy yields ---
get_yield_df <- function(res, mn, scen) {
  yld <- getYield(res)                 # rows = saved timesteps
  n_t <- nrow(yld)
  yld %>% melt() %>%
    mutate(model = mn, scenario = scen) %>%
    filter(!sp %in% c("small_fish", "ruffe")) %>%
    # overwrite whatever 'time' melt produced with a clean step index
    group_by(sp) %>%
    mutate(step = row_number() - 1) %>%   # 0,1,2,... per species
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(year = decline_start + step)   # 1993, 1994, ...
}

y_realistic <- bind_rows(lapply(names(realistic_results), function(mn) {
  bind_rows(
    get_yield_df(realistic_results[[mn]]$Baseline, mn, "Baseline"),
    get_yield_df(realistic_results[[mn]]$`With maturity decline`, mn, "With maturity decline")
  )
}))

```

```{r}
combined_biomass_data <- data.frame()

for (model_name in names(realistic_results)) {
  for (scenario_name in names(realistic_results[[model_name]])) {
    sim <- realistic_results[[model_name]][[scenario_name]]
    biomass <- getBiomass(sim)

    biomass_long <- as.data.frame(biomass) %>%
      mutate(time = as.numeric(rownames(biomass))) %>%
      pivot_longer(cols = -time, names_to = "species", values_to = "biomass") %>%
      mutate(model = model_name, scenario = scenario_name)

    combined_biomass_data <- bind_rows(combined_biomass_data, biomass_long)
  }
}

biomass_change_summary <- combined_biomass_data %>%
  group_by(model, scenario, species) %>%
  mutate(biomass_change_percent = (biomass - first(biomass)) / first(biomass) * 100) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(scenario, species, time) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_change   = mean(biomass_change_percent),
    median_change = median(biomass_change_percent),
    min_change    = min(biomass_change_percent),
    max_change    = max(biomass_change_percent),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  mutate(scenario_label = scenario)   # "Baseline" / "With maturity decline"

species_colors <- c(
  "small_fish"  = "#FCC300",
  "ruffe"       = "#44AA99",
  "bream"       = "#b2182b",
  "white_bream" = "#661100",
  "roach"       = "#AA4499",
  "perch"       = "#2166ac",
  "pikeperch"   = "#93AA00"
)

p0 <- ggplot(biomass_change_summary,
             aes(x = time, y = mean_change, color = species, fill = species)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = min_change, ymax = max_change), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap2(~ scenario_label, scales = "fixed", ncol = 1,
              axes = "all", remove_labels = "x") +
  labs(x = "Time (years)", y = "Biomass Change (%)",
       color = "Species", fill = "Species") +
  scale_color_manual(values = species_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = species_colors) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    panel.border       = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x.bottom = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
    axis.line.y.left   = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
    strip.background   = element_blank(),
    strip.text  = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", hjust = 0, margin = margin(b = 5)),
    axis.line   = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
    axis.text   = element_text(size = 9, color = "black"),
    axis.title  = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    axis.ticks  = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
    legend.position   = "right",
    legend.title      = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text       = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.key        = element_blank(),
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.margin     = margin(10, 10, 10, 10),
    plot.subtitle   = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 0.5)
  )

print(p0)

baseline_diff_summary <- combined_biomass_data %>%
  group_by(model, scenario, species) %>%
  mutate(biomass_change_percent = (biomass - first(biomass)) / first(biomass) * 100) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(model, species, time, scenario, biomass_change_percent) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = scenario, values_from = biomass_change_percent) %>%
  mutate(diff = `With maturity decline` - Baseline) %>%
  group_by(species, time) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_diff = mean(diff),
    min_diff  = min(diff),
    max_diff  = max(diff),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

p_diff <- ggplot(baseline_diff_summary,
                 aes(x = time, y = mean_diff, color = species, fill = species)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = min_diff, ymax = max_diff), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Time (years)",
       y = "Difference from baseline (%)",
       color = "Species", fill = "Species") +
  scale_color_manual(values = species_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = species_colors) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x.bottom = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
    axis.line.y.left   = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
    axis.text   = element_text(size = 9, color = "black"),
    axis.title  = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    axis.ticks  = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
    legend.position   = "right",
    legend.title      = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text       = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.key        = element_blank(),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.margin     = margin(10, 10, 10, 10)
  )

print(p_diff)
```


```{r}
sp_order
# compare against the order panels actually appear:
sort(unique(as.character(abs_band_tonnes$sp)))


effort_long <- as.data.frame(f_main) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("year") %>%
  mutate(year = as.numeric(year)) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(-year, names_to = "sp", values_to = "effort")

scale_tbl <- abs_band_tonnes %>%
  group_by(sp) %>% summarise(ymax_panel = max(ymax, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(
    effort_long %>% group_by(sp) %>% summarise(emax = max(effort, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop"),
    by = "sp"
  ) %>%
  mutate(sf = ymax_panel / emax)

effort_long <- effort_long %>%
  left_join(scale_tbl, by = "sp") %>%
  mutate(effort_scaled = effort * sf)

library(ggh4x)
sp_order <- levels(factor(abs_band_tonnes$sp))   # panel order top-left → bottom-right

y_scales <- lapply(sp_order, function(s) {
  sf  <- scale_tbl$sf[scale_tbl$sp == s]
  emx <- scale_tbl$emax[scale_tbl$sp == s]
  brks <- pretty(c(0, emx), n = 3)
  brks <- brks[brks <= emx * 1.02]
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits   = c(0, NA),
    expand   = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / sf, name = "Fishing mortality (F)", breaks = brks)
  )
})
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# SETUP / CALCULATIONS
# ============================================================
library(ggh4x)

area_km2 <- 381.6

# --- Absolute yield band (ribbon data), converted to tonnes ---
abs_band <- y_realistic %>%
  group_by(sp, year, scenario) %>%
  summarise(ymin = min(value), ymax = max(value),
            ymean = mean(value), .groups = "drop")

abs_band_tonnes <- abs_band %>%
  mutate(
    ymin  = ymin  * area_km2,
    ymax  = ymax  * area_km2,
    ymean = ymean * area_km2
  )

# Drop unused factor levels (small_fish, ruffe have no panels here)
# so panels render only for species present, in factor-level order:
# bream, white_bream, roach, perch, pikeperch
abs_band_tonnes$sp <- droplevels(abs_band_tonnes$sp)

# --- Cumulative loss labels (from percent-change pipeline) ---
yield_changes <- y_realistic %>%
  select(step, year, sp, model, scenario, value) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = scenario, values_from = value) %>%
  mutate(percent_change = ((`With maturity decline` - Baseline) / Baseline) * 100)

uncertainty <- yield_changes %>%
  group_by(sp, step, year) %>%
  summarise(min_percent_change = min(percent_change, na.rm = TRUE),
            max_percent_change = max(percent_change, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

cumulative_loss_labels <- uncertainty %>%
  group_by(sp) %>%
  summarise(total_min_loss = sum(min_percent_change, na.rm = TRUE),
            total_max_loss = sum(max_percent_change, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(label = paste0("Cumulative loss: ", round(total_max_loss, 0),
                        " — ", round(total_min_loss, 0), "%"),
         x_pos = decline_end - 1, y_pos = -1)

# --- Effort data (F values) reshaped long, names matched to yield ---
effort_long <- as.data.frame(f_main) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("year") %>%
  mutate(year = as.numeric(year)) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(-year, names_to = "sp", values_to = "effort")

# Align effort sp factor to the same levels/order as the yield data
effort_long$sp <- factor(effort_long$sp, levels = levels(abs_band_tonnes$sp))

# --- Per-species scale factor (yield max / effort max) ---
scale_tbl <- abs_band_tonnes %>%
  group_by(sp) %>% summarise(ymax_panel = max(ymax, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(
    effort_long %>% group_by(sp) %>% summarise(emax = max(effort, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop"),
    by = "sp"
  ) %>%
  mutate(sf = ymax_panel / emax)

# sanity check — should have NO NA / Inf in emax or sf
print(scale_tbl)

effort_long <- effort_long %>%
  left_join(scale_tbl, by = "sp") %>%
  mutate(effort_scaled = effort * sf)

# ============================================================
# PER-PANEL Y-SCALES
# ============================================================
# Panel render order = factor levels, restricted to species present
sp_order <- levels(abs_band_tonnes$sp)
sp_order <- sp_order[sp_order %in% unique(as.character(abs_band_tonnes$sp))]
# → bream, white_bream, roach, perch, pikeperch

y_scales <- lapply(sp_order, function(s) {
  row <- scale_tbl[scale_tbl$sp == s, ]
  sf  <- row$sf
  emx <- row$emax

  # No valid effort for this species → plain axis, no secondary axis
  if (length(sf) == 0 || is.na(sf) || !is.finite(sf) || sf <= 0) {
    return(scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA),
                              expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))))
  }

  brks <- pretty(c(0, emx), n = 3)
  brks <- brks[brks > 0 & brks <= emx]          # valid interior ticks only
  if (length(brks) == 0) brks <- round(emx, 2)  # guard: never empty

  scale_y_continuous(
    limits   = c(0, NA),
    expand   = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / sf, name = "Fishing mortality (F)",
                        breaks = c(0, brks))
  )
})

# ============================================================
# PLOT
# ============================================================
yield_absolute <- ggplot() +
  geom_ribbon(data = abs_band_tonnes,
              aes(x = year, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, fill = scenario),
              alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = -Inf, color = "gray5", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -Inf, color = "gray5", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_line(data = effort_long,
            aes(x = year, y = effort_scaled),
            color = "gray5", linewidth = 0.3, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = cumulative_loss_labels,
            aes(x = x_pos, y = -Inf, label = label),
            size = 4, fontface = "bold", hjust = 0.95, vjust = -0.5,
            inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap2(~sp, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2,
              labeller = as_labeller(function(x) gsub("_", " ", x))) +
  facetted_pos_scales(y = y_scales) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "grey40",
                                "With maturity decline" = "firebrick"),
                     labels = c("Baseline" = "Baseline",
                                "With maturity decline" = "Declining size at maturity")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = c("Baseline" = "grey40",
                                "With maturity decline" = "firebrick"),
                    labels  = c("Baseline" = "Baseline",
                                "With maturity decline" = "Declining size at maturity")) +
  labs(x = "Time (year)", y = "Yield (tonnes)", color = NULL, fill = NULL) +
  My_theme +
  theme(
  legend.position    = "bottom",
  axis.line.y.right  = element_line(color = "gray5", linewidth = 0.3)
)

yield_absolute

# ggsave("yield_absoluteF.tiff", yield_absolute, width = 9, height = 8, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
```


```{r}
# Convert yields to tonnes by multiplying by area
area_km2 <- 381.6

# === PLOT A: ABSOLUTE YIELDS (wiggles visible) ===
abs_band <- y_realistic %>%
  group_by(sp, year, scenario) %>%
  summarise(ymin = min(value), ymax = max(value),
            ymean = mean(value), .groups = "drop")

abs_band_tonnes <- abs_band %>%
  mutate(
    ymin  = ymin  * area_km2,
    ymax  = ymax  * area_km2,
    ymean = ymean * area_km2
  )

# ggsave("yield_loss.tiff", yield_loss, width = 7, height = 7, dpi = 600, bg = "white")

yield_absolute <- ggplot() +
  geom_ribbon(data = abs_band_tonnes,
              aes(x = year, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, fill = scenario),
              alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = -Inf, color = "gray5", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -Inf, color = "gray5", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_line(data = effort_long,
          aes(x = year, y = effort_scaled),
          color = "black", linewidth = 0.3, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  #geom_line(data = abs_band_tonnes,
  #          aes(x = year, y = ymean, color = scenario),
  #          linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_text(data = cumulative_loss_labels,
          aes(x = x_pos, y = -Inf, label = label),
          size = 4, fontface = "bold", hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5,
          inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap2(~sp, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2,
            labeller = as_labeller(function(x) gsub("_", " ", x))) +
  facetted_pos_scales(y = y_scales) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "grey40",
                                "With maturity decline" = "firebrick"),
                     labels = c("Baseline" = "Baseline",
                                "With maturity decline" = "Declining size at maturity")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = c("Baseline" = "grey40",
                                "With maturity decline" = "firebrick"),
                    labels  = c("Baseline" = "Baseline",
                                "With maturity decline" = "Declining size at maturity")) +
  labs(x = "Time (year)", y = "Yield (tonnes)", color = NULL, fill = NULL) +
  My_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# ggsave("yield_absolute.tiff", yield_absolute, width = 8, height = 8, dpi = 600, bg = "white")

# === PLOT B: PERCENT CHANGE (smooth maturity signal) ===
yield_changes <- y_realistic %>%
  select(step, year, sp, model, scenario, value) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = scenario, values_from = value) %>%
  mutate(percent_change = ((`With maturity decline` - Baseline) / Baseline) * 100)

uncertainty <- yield_changes %>%
  group_by(sp, step, year) %>%
  summarise(min_percent_change = min(percent_change, na.rm = TRUE),
            max_percent_change = max(percent_change, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

cumulative_loss_labels <- uncertainty %>%
  group_by(sp) %>%
  summarise(total_min_loss = sum(min_percent_change, na.rm = TRUE),
            total_max_loss = sum(max_percent_change, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(label = paste0("Cumulative loss: ", round(total_max_loss, 0),
                        " — ", round(total_min_loss, 0), "%"),
         x_pos = decline_end - 1, y_pos = -1)


yield_loss <- ggplot() +
  geom_ribbon(data = uncertainty,
              aes(x = year, ymin = min_percent_change, ymax = max_percent_change),
              fill = "grey70", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_line(data = yield_changes,
            aes(x = year, y = percent_change, group = model),
            color = "grey20", alpha = 0.6, linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0,    linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = -Inf, color = "gray5", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -Inf, color = "gray5", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_text(data = cumulative_loss_labels,
            aes(x = x_pos, y = y_pos, label = label),
            size = 4, fontface = "bold", hjust = 1, vjust = 1, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~sp, scales = "fixed", ncol = 2,
            labeller = as_labeller(function(x) gsub("_", " ", x))) +
  labs(x = "Time (year)", y = "Percent change (%)") +
  My_theme

# ggsave("yield_loss.tiff", yield_loss, width = 7, height = 7, dpi = 600, bg = "white")

# write.csv(abs_band, "abs_band.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```


-------------THE END---------- 🐟🎣
